---
title: "How to Run the Pipeline"
---

Set the root path at the top of `0_master.do` to point to the pipeline root folder on your machine. The root path is defined as a global macro and all dofiles inherit it automatically — do not edit paths in individual dofiles.

Then run `0_master.do`. This file calls the three module masters in order:

1. `1_0_revenue_master.do`
2. `2_0_factorshares_master.do`
3. `3_0_ETR_master.do`

Each master calls its own sub-dofiles in sequence.

## Output locations

| Location | Contents |
|---|---|
| `work_data/` | Intermediate datasets used between dofiles |
| `aux_data/` | Crosswalks, lookups, and auxiliary reference files |
| `output/` | Final datasets and figures |

## Important rules

- Do not run individual dofiles in isolation unless you are testing a specific step.
- Always ensure all upstream files are current before running any dofile midway through the pipeline.
- If you change the vintage label (e.g. from 2026 to 2027), update the output filenames consistently across all dofiles that save or load versioned files.
